conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Could you help me find the pasta sauces?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Of course! They're in aisle seven, on the middle shelf. Is there a particular brand you're looking for?

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Not really, but are there any special offers on them at the moment?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Yes, actually. The 'Mama Rosa' brand is on a 'buy one, get one free' offer this week.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Oh, that's great! And do you know if the fresh basil is on sale too?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Let me check... Yes, all fresh herbs are 20% off until tomorrow.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Perfect, thank you so much for your help!

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: You're very welcome. Have a nice day!

questions.question: Where can the customer find the pasta sauces?
options: On the top shelf in aisle seven
In aisle seven on the middle shelf

questions.question: What is the special offer on the 'Mama Rosa' pasta sauce?
options: Three for the price of two

questions.question: What else does the customer ask about?
What is the discount on fresh herbs?
